title: Loopscale - Rekt
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation leading to undercollateralized loan exploitation

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates oracle feeds followed by creating undercollateralized loans

summary: Loopscale suffered a $5.8 million loss due to an attacker manipulating oracle feeds and exploiting undercollateralized loans. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring oracle manipulation followed by the creation of undercollateralized loans.
